scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: DU says it considers grades and coursework and likes to see that applicants challenged themselves and achieved success in subjects like English, math, social studies, science, and foreign language.
areas.detail: DU says it considers grades and coursework and likes to see that applicants challenged themselves and achieved success in subjects like English, math, social studies, science, and foreign language.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: DU's general how-to-apply guidance lists additional letters of recommendation as optional supplemental materials, though some programs or applicant types may have specific recommendation requirements.
areas.detail: DU's general how-to-apply guidance lists additional letters of recommendation as optional supplemental materials, though some programs or applicant types may have specific recommendation requirements.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: DU requires one application essay through the Common Application; students may choose any current-year Common App prompt for that required essay.
areas.detail: DU requires one application essay through the Common Application; students may choose any current-year Common App prompt for that required essay.
